subcodes.first_line: The Most Exalted Pen maketh mention of Mine Afnán who hath inhaled the fragrance of My loving-kindness, hath turned unto Mine horizon and clung fast unto the cord [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان قلمی الاعلی یذکر افنانی الذی وجد عرف عنایتی و اقبل الی افقی و تمسک بحبل
subcodes.subjects: @thankfulness; gratitude, @praise and encouragement, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @rejection, opposition and persecution
